title: Recipes
subtitle: Ready-to-use examples. Copy, paste, and customize.

storeLocator.title: Store Locator
storeLocator.description: Display store locations on a map with clickable markers and info popups. Great for retail sites, restaurant finders, or any location directory.

deliveryTracker.title: Delivery Tracker
deliveryTracker.description: Animated route with ant trail effect, restaurant popup with image, and delivery destination marker.

realEstate.title: Real Estate Map
realEstate.description: Property listings with category-based color clustering, image popups, and animated markers.
